text: The updated Clinical Practice Guidelines for Arterial Hypertension with Recommendations were prepared by the Polish Society of Hypertension. An interdisciplinary group of Polish hypertension, cardiology, nephrology and primary care experts made the recommendations. The updated guidelines translate the most up-to-date evidence derived from clinical trials as well as an international consensu s and provide effective clinical tools in the management of arterial hypertension, addressing therapeutic strategies, non-pharmacological measurements and treatment of co-morbid conditions, all tailored to the situation in the Polish health care system.
headline: Fully Human Written
